race.comment: DIAMOND WARRIOR (3) resumes off the back of a nice trial recently and looks primed for a bold showing. He was strong on when fresh last campaign when a $4.20 chance and he's trialled better this time in. Can notch up his maiden win first-up. FEARLESS HOPLITES (2) got the job done in a recent Lark Hill trial and looks ready to fire in a suitable race on debut. He's got a couple of handy siblings up he looks to get every chance from a favourable alley. Can be in the finish fresh. PERFECTLY PROPER (10) trialled well between runs but got well back and never featured off a 67-day freshen last start. Fitter for that and the rise in grade should suit. Expecting a much better performance this time. LEG GODT (14) comes through the same race as PERFECTLY PROPER and beat that runner home. Worth including with Chris Parnham on board. FILA MIA (11) can feature second-up.
